title: codex 频繁写 ssd 对 ssd 寿命有影响
content: OpenAI Codex frequently writes logs to SSD, which users report may affect SSD lifespan. GitHub issues #17320 and #28224 document this concern. A workaround involves creating an SQLite trigger in `~/.codex/logs_2.sqlite` to block insert operations on the logs table, preventing persistent writes while using a temporary solution.

title: 把 Rust 概念翻译成 JS 心智模型，做了个面向前端的交互式教程
content: 自己是写前端的，学 Rust 时被所有权/借用/生命周期反复劝退，就边学边做了个网站，把这些概念用 JS/TS 的对照来讲，难懂的部分（所有权、借用、迭代器）都配了交互动画，代码块还能直接在页面里改了跑（接的官方 Playground ）。 前几天发了一个类似的课程 <赶在被封前…

title: 中式坐月子，震撼欧美产妇圈 | 原文
content: Chinese-style postpartum confinement—involving warm drinks, avoiding cold air, rest, and limited standing—is gaining popularity among Western mothers after being shared online. Many report reduced pain and advocate global adoption. Traditional Western postpartum care is declining as Chinese wellness practices become a new trend.

title: pppscn/SmsForwarder
content: SmsForwarder is an Android app that monitors SMS, calls, and app notifications, forwarding them to various platforms including DingTalk, WeChat Work, email, webhook, Telegram, and more. Version 3.0 adds remote control capabilities for sending SMS, checking messages, calls, contacts, and battery status.

title: 针对同一问题， Claude 和 Gemini 的实践对比。
content: A user compared Claude Opus 4.6 (Thinking) and Gemini 3.1 Pro (High) on querying the latest OpenJDK version numbers for Alpine 3.24.0, Debian 13.5.0, and Rocky 10.2.0 base images. Claude completed the task in one minute with a clean table showing all three versions were current at 21.0.11. Gemini took six minutes, ran numerous redundant commands with incorrect parameters (wrong Debian branch, wrong Rocky version, repeated failed attempts), and ultimately failed to produce a coherent answer.

title: Vibe Coding 了两年，分享一下我对于 Vibe 的感想。
content: The author reflects on two years of "Vibe Coding" (AI-assisted programming), tracing its evolution from 2024's early models to 2025's established practice. They describe learning prompt engineering through trial and error, observing how the community attracts both productive workers and performative users who seek status through token consumption. The author categorizes Vibe Coders into three types: purists who rely entirely on AI, heavy users who treat AI as a "cyber prosthetic" for filling gaps, and light users who only occasionally leverage AI. They note that genuine practitioners are too busy working to post online, while the loudest voices often lack substance.

title: 介绍一下 flatpark
content: Flatpark is an alternative app store to Flathub, created after its founder faced rejection trying to submit IBKR software under Flathub's new policy banning AI-assisted submissions. It uses the same runtimes as Flathub but offers simpler app publishing and faster runtime updates. The founder invites users to contribute apps and share feedback.

title: 智谱创始人唐杰隔空对话马斯克：赶超Claude Fable 5不用等到2027年
content: On June 18, Zhipu founder Tang Jie and Elon Musk discussed when Chinese AI models would catch up to US levels on X. An analyst estimated GLM-5.2 at Claude Opus 4.7-4.8, suggesting a 7-month gap, with parity by November-December 2026. Musk predicted 2027 Q1. Tang responded that "it won't take that long," implying Zhipu could achieve significant progress this year. While GLM-5.2 ranks top among open-weight models, critics note its lack of cross-conversation memory. The discussion highlighted native multimodal capabilities as the key differentiator, with Tang previously teasing Zhipu's upcoming release in this area.

title: Ask HN: Will programmers write more efficient code during the memory shortage?
content: Hacker News users debated whether current memory shortages would motivate programmers to write more efficient code. Some commenters expressed skepticism, noting that modern development practices prioritize developer productivity and time-to-market over resource optimization. Others suggested that economic pressures from rising hardware costs could temporarily shift priorities, but doubted any lasting cultural change in the industry. The discussion highlighted a tension between software craftsmanship and business incentives.

title: 硅谷最抢手的新岗位出现了
content: AI firms are shifting focus from model development to enterprise deployment, creating a surge in demand for Forward Deployment Engineers (FDEs) who embed at client sites to integrate AI into existing workflows. Major players including OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google Cloud are hiring thousands of FDEs with salaries reaching $500,000 annually, while investing billions in deployment subsidiaries. The role originated at Palantir, which pioneered on-site engineer placement over a decade ago. Industry data shows FDE job postings grew 42-fold between 2023 and 2025, three times faster than AI engineer roles. The trend indicates AI's primary challenge has become organizational transformation rather than technical capability, as companies struggle with data silos, legacy systems, compliance requirements, and internal resistance despite possessing advanced AI tools.

title: 把你的 ChatGPT 变成 Codex
content: coding-tools-mcp is a local MCP server that connects ChatGPT to external tools. Users can add it via chatgpt.com to enable web-based models like GPT-5.5 Pro to directly read and execute code from local projects. This gives ChatGPT the same local code repository manipulation capabilities as GitHub Codex.

title: 每日一个小项目之步进电机 FOC
content:
昨晚突发奇想，想用 GLM-5.2 把手里积压已久、还能抢救一下的陈年老项目都往前推一推。结果翻到了这个 FOC 项目。 这个项目之前已经被我永久归档了，原因很简单：ESP32-C3 的外设能力实在太弱，根本撑不起我预设的指标。

我的目标是做 10kHz 电流环…

title: 上线自营家装App，京东阿里字节快手激战万亿市场
content:
Major Chinese tech firms are aggressively entering the trillion-yuan home renovation market. JD launched "JD Self-Operated Renovation" app offering comprehensive services, while Alibaba's Tmall introduced AI-powered platform and B-to-B tools. Ant's Alipay offers "Home Decoration Bao" for fund escrow. ByteDance's Zhuxiaobang pivoted to content services; Kuaishou expanded through live-streaming and agent recruitment.

JD uniquely pursues heavy-asset self-operated model with 5,200+ workers and acquisitions. The market is shifting from new homes to renovation of existing 50-trillion-yuan housing stock. Internet giants aim to solve industry problems of opacity, fund security, and standardization while capturing the "family consumption entry point" for long-term customer value. Profitability remains distant due to non-standardized, labor-intensive operations.

title: 存储荒蔓延，库克暗示苹果产品将涨价，史上最贵iPhone要来了？
content: Apple CEO Tim Cook confirmed that rising memory and flash storage costs, driven by AI infrastructure demand diverting supply, will force price increases on some products. The iPhone 18 Pro faces particular pressure as storage upgrades are essential for AI features, yet Apple's AI offerings lack compelling differentiation. Compounding challenges include delayed standard iPhone and foldable launches, leaving only Pro models to carry sales, plus an approaching leadership transition from Cook to John Ternus and continued reliance on Google's Gemini for core AI capabilities.

title: 停火后的中石油，天然气和石油谁才是真正的利润发动机？——兼与中海油360度全维对比
content:
朋友们好，我是鸣鸣。 这周最大的新闻，6月15日美伊宣布停火，布伦特原油三天之内从95美元跌到78美元，中国石油跟着跌了两天，中国海油跌了三天。

有趣的是，我在上周末的暴跌里翻到his1963的一条帖子。他说的是："我绝不立足于今年布油年均价90甚至100美元以上…

title: 问一个直击灵魂的问题，你用 AI 做了哪些有意义的工具？
content:
这是一个我问自己的问题，也是我逛帖子发现的一个问题。 大家都在用 AI 写代码，写公司的项目。

更多的人是用 AI 写重复的轮子，比如对话、画图、写作等。

所以这就产生一个核心的问题，个人到底能用 AI 做什么？如何开发有意义的产品，如何为少数人的需求开发产品？

以前总是抱怨…

title: 日本宣布赴日签证费用涨价5倍，为何一次增长这么多，会产生什么影响？
content: 日本宣布7月1日起，赴日签证费用涨价5倍，单次入境和多次入境费分别涨至15000日元（约630元人民币）和30000日元（约1260元人民币）_腾讯新闻

AI is driving a historic reassessment of the memory/storage industry. Major storage companies like Micron and SanDisk have surged dramatically, with SanDisk up over 800% this year. Unlike prior cycles, AI creates exponentially expanding data needs: machines now generate, learn from, and retrieve massive datasets. Memory bandwidth and capacity are as critical as GPU compute for AI training, inference, and agent memory. While storage remains underappreciated compared to GPUs, it is shifting from supporting role to core infrastructure in the AI era.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 但斌

title: 夫妻立下血腥同盟，谋杀第三者举行人肉烧烤派对，女警局长追踪两年终破案(2) | 原文
content: A married couple formed a murderous pact, killing a third person and holding a cannibalistic barbecue party. A female police chief investigated the case for two years before finally solving it. The case involved a newlywed wife shot dead at home by her husband's police officer ex-girlfriend, with colleagues covering up the crime to help her evade justice.

title: 夫妻立下血腥同盟，谋杀第三者举行人肉烧烤派对，女警局长追踪两年终破案(1) | 原文
content: A couple in Iron River, Michigan, formed a murderous pact, killed a third person, and held a cannibalistic barbecue party. The town, once a prosperous iron mining hub in the 19th century, fell into decline during the late 20th century due to global industrial shifts and depleted ore reserves. A female police chief spent two years tracking the suspects before finally solving the case.

title: 放弃出片的中产，挤爆「旅游兴趣班」
content: Young Chinese tourists are abandoning social media-driven check-in culture for skill-based vacations, enrolling in short "interest classes" while traveling. Popular options include Thai cooking in Chiang Mai, batik dyeing in Dali, ancient paper-making in Yunnan, and martial arts on Wudang Mountain. This shift reflects fatigue with homogeneous, Instagram-replicated experiences where every destination offers identical food streets, photo shoots, and predictable itineraries. These classes promise something photos cannot: focused "flow" states, temporary escape from professional identity, and the chance to briefly embody an alternate self—even if the resulting pottery bowl is crooked and the martial arts skills evaporate after checkout.

title: 一个全栈独立开发者的自白： FlyEnv 让我找回了对开发的热情
content: FlyEnv is a free, open-source local development environment tool that replaces Docker with native binaries, drastically reducing memory usage from gigabytes to 200-400MB and enabling instant startup. It offers automatic PHP and Node version switching per project, built-in DNS, and one-click SSL for local HTTPS. Drawbacks include English-only UI and some unoptimized low-memory templates for newer modules like Elasticsearch. The developer suggests adding a plugin marketplace and relaxing site limits for heavy users, though community contributions can unlock a pro version.

title: 刚刚，诺贝尔奖得主成Anthropic新员工
content: Nobel laureate John Jumper, core leader of AlphaFold, left Google DeepMind after nine years to join Anthropic. Jumper, who became the youngest chemistry Nobelist in 70 years at age 39, led AlphaFold to solve the 50-year protein folding problem and expand known protein structures 1,000-fold. His departure follows Noam Shazeer's exit to OpenAI just two days earlier—despite Google's $2.7 billion investment to retain him. Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google DeepMind are all aggressively competing in AI-driven life sciences research and drug discovery.

title: 花钱雇AI当同事，我的生意怎么样了？
content: Five Chinese professionals describe integrating AI "digital employees" into their work. A lawyer uses 45 custom skills to automate legal research and drafting, reducing casework to 20% of his time. A跨境电商 entrepreneur replaced three employees with four AI agents for文案, customer service, coding, and ad management, cutting monthly costs from ¥50,000 to ¥4,000. An investment partner deploys agents to screen deals and research companies overnight. A startup founder treats ChatGPT as advisor, Cursor as engineer, and Codex as intern to build products without technical staff. A journalist uses AI for transcription, editing, and learning, spending ¥1,000–1,500 monthly. All emphasize that AI requires human judgment, detailed instructions, and incremental implementation.

title: Zenzizenzizenzic
content: "Zenzizenzizenzic" is an archaic mathematical term referring to the eighth power of a number, coined by 16th-century English mathematician Robert Recorde. The word represents the square of squares squared (x²²² or x⁸) and is notable for having more consecutive Zs than any other word in the English language. It appears in Recorde's mathematics treatise "The Whetstone of Witte" (1557).

title: 只有再次解放思想，才能打开经济增长新空间 | 原文
content: A speaker at a political economy forum addresses the mismatch between China's industrial advancement and macroeconomic conditions. Despite capturing global market share from Germany, France, and Japan in key sectors, domestic consumption, employment, growth, and inflation have not improved correspondingly. China is now flirting with deflation, which poses greater challenges than inflation as it discourages household formation and spending. The core argument is that only through renewed ideological emancipation can new space for economic growth be opened.

title: 高考后没有了目标怎么办？
content: Many students feel aimless after the college entrance exam because their long-term goal disappears. To rebuild direction, they can explore interests through travel, reading, or hobbies; learn practical skills like driving or computing; plan their university life and career path; maintain routines through exercise or part-time work; and seek guidance from counselors or mentors if anxiety persists.

title: The New Rules of Media | Marc Andreessen & Ben Horowitz
content: Marc Andreessen, Ben Horowitz, and others discuss how the internet has transformed media and influence. They explore the move from legacy media to creator-led platforms, the growing value of authenticity, and how founders can build audiences by communicating directly with stakeholders. Topics include podcasts, social media, corporate communications, and strategies for developing a public voice in an era of decentralized distribution.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Marc Andreessen, Ben Horowitz, Erik Torenberg, Gaby Goldberg)

title: [痛史]郭力: 北大等五所高校学生右派的回忆(2) | 原文
content: The material references historical accounts of the 1957 Anti-Rightist Campaign, citing correspondence between Peking University philosophy graduate student Yu Dunkang and Wuhan University teaching assistant Zhang Shouzheng. Both were later labeled as rightists. The text also references memoirs by Wu Kaibin and Fu Zhitong documenting experiences during this period. The material appears to continue a series of recollections by Guo Li about student rightists from five universities including Peking University.

title: [痛史]郭力: 北大等五所高校学生右派的回忆(1) | 原文
content: This article by Guo Li, born in 1957 and a Peking University Chinese Department graduate, recounts the 1957 Anti-Rightist Campaign's impact on students at five universities. Young intellectuals who offered patriotic suggestions without political motives were persecuted, suffering two decades of humiliation. The work documents this painful historical episode through collective memories of student "rightists."

title: How we built an internal data analytics agent
content: GitHub built Qubot, an internal analytics agent powered by Copilot, to enable employees to query data in plain language via Slack, VS Code, or CLI. Its architecture comprises three components: a multi-channel interface, a federated context layer with bronze/silver/gold data documentation, and a query engine connecting to Kusto and Trino. A context agent ingests team contributions, while an evaluation framework tests changes before deployment. Adoption has reduced reliance on analyst support, with structured context proving critical to accuracy and speed. Product and business teams own their respective data inputs, creating a sustainable hub-and-spoke model.
